pi_items.source: Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 34 and export_result.sh line 19 using curl to this endpoint with Bearer token
Verified in verifier.py line 62 checks watermarkSettings.useUserName field; setup_task.sh shows useUserName field in reset payload

Task description (line 5 of task.json) explicitly states opacity should be 'between 30% and 40%', which is 0.30-0.40 in decimal format. Metadata claims 0.25-0.45 (25-45%), which contradicts the stated requirement.

Task description (line 5 of task.json) explicitly states opacity should be 'between 30% and 40%', which is 0.30-0.40 in decimal format. Metadata claims 0.25-0.45 (25-45%), which contradicts the stated requirement.

900 seconds = 15 minutes (900/60 = 15). Task description line 5 states 'Limit session duration to 15 minutes'. Verified in verifier.py line 33 and export_result.sh line 28 which sets sessionTimeoutS field.
Verified in verifier.py lines 34 and 86-87 where diff = abs(timeout_s - expected_timeout) is checked against timeout_tolerance (60 seconds)

Verified in verifier.py line 97 checks trafficEncryptionForced OR forceSecureConnection fields. Web search confirms trafficEncryptionForced is a real Nx Witness API setting documented in official help pages (s3.amazonaws.com/resources.vmsproxy.com/nx_4.1_help/configuring_secure_connection.htm)
Verified in verifier.py line 108 checks auditTrailEnabled field. Setup_task.sh line 30 shows auditTrailEnabled in the reset payload.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Nx Witness VMS (real software from NetworkOptix, version 5.1.5.39242 or 6.0.1.39873) with security settings via REST API endpoint /rest/v1/system/settings. The metadata defines six verified configuration requirements: watermark username enabled, timeout set to 900 seconds (15 minutes), HTTPS forced, and audit trail enabled. However, there is a contradiction regarding watermark opacity: the task description requires opacity between 30-40%, but the metadata verification thresholds accept 25-45%, allowing an unspecified wider tolerance range.
